title: Maasu Local Lyrics Motta Shiva Ketta Shiva Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Lo Lo Local Maasu Song Lyrics Motta Siva Ketta Siva
Music:Amresh Ganesh

pakka maass
marana maass
maas maas maas

maasa rough and touch-a
theriyuvom naanga.
figure-a kodutha
supera konjuvom ponga.

raavaanaalum konjuvom
pagalaanaalum konjuvom
sirichaalum konjuvom
morachaalum konjuvom

lo lo lo local
marana maasu
pakka local

pakkaththoottu
edhirvoottu
ponnugengalaam yaenga.

maassa kitta vandhu
kissu onnu thaanga.

kannathula kissungo
kazhuthula kissungo
iduppula kissungo
just konjam missungo

motta shiva da
romba ketta shiva da

motta siva ketta siva da
da da da

un motta thala kooda
maasu da.
un morattu pudiyum
maasu da.

un stylum thimirum
maasuda.
nee eppadi vandhaalum
maasuda.

lo lo lo local
marana maasu
pakka local

un mookkum muzhiyum
maasuda.
un mullu kuthum meesa kooda
maasuda

nee ninna nadandhaa
maasuda
un nizhalum enakku
maasuda

lo lo lo local
marana maasu
pakka local

nee looku vidum
stylum maasuda
nee aadura vegamum
maasu da.

enna adichu pidichaalum
maasu da
enna alli pudichaalum
maasu da.

lo lo lo local
marana maasu
pakka local

un kaandha karupu kooda
maasu da
un kalla sirippu kooda
maasu da

un muththamum konjalum
maasu da.
ada moththalula
maasukke nee
maasu da.

maasa rough and touch-a
theriyuvom naanga.
figure-a kodutha
supera konjuvom ponga.

raavaanaalum konjuvom
pagalaanaalum konjuvom
sirichaalum konjuvom
morachaalum konjuvom

lo lo lo local
marana maasu
pakka local

pakkaththoottu
edhirvoottu
ponnugengalaam yaenga.

maassa kitta vandhu
kissu onnu thaanga.

kannathula kissungo
kazhuthula kissungo
iduppula kissungo
just konjam missungo

motta shiva da
romba ketta shiva da

motta siva ketta siva da
da da da

motta shiva
ketta shiva

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Maasu Local'?

'Maasu Local' is an energetic dance number that celebrates local culture and the joy of partying, making it a perfect anthem for celebrations.

What is the plot context of the movie 'Motta Shiva Ketta Shiva'?

The movie revolves around a cop who takes on a powerful gangster, and the song fits into the narrative by showcasing the vibrant and lively atmosphere of the protagonist's life.

Who is the music director of 'Maasu Local'?

The music for 'Maasu Local' is composed by Amresh Ganesh, known for his catchy and upbeat compositions.

When was 'Maasu Local' released?

'Maasu Local' was released on April 6, 2016, and has since become a popular party anthem.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Maasu Local', the vibrant energy of the song reflects the celebratory spirit of the movie, Motta Shiva Ketta Shiva. The lyrics convey a sense of joy and excitement, inviting listeners to join in the fun. This dance number is designed to uplift the mood and get everyone moving, making it a perfect fit for parties and celebrations. Overall, the song encapsulates the essence of local festivities and the exuberance of life.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Maasu Local from Motta Shiva Ketta Shiva is a high-energy dance number that perfectly captures the vibrant spirit of celebration. With its catchy beats and lively lyrics, this song is sure to get everyone on their feet. Experience the unique collaboration of Amresh Ganesh's music that brings a fresh twist to the Tamil music scene!
